# YOUR CODE HERE
import sys

def main():
    N, M = map(int, sys.stdin.readline().split())
    S = sys.stdin.readline().strip()

    # Track the availability of plain and logo T-shirts
    plain_available = M
    logo_available = 0
    # Track used T-shirts (we need to know when they become available)
    plain_used = set()
    logo_used = set()

    for day in range(N):
        if S[day] == '0':
            # Wash all used T-shirts
            plain_available = M
            logo_available = 0
            plain_used = set()
            logo_used = set()
        elif S[day] == '1':
            # Can wear plain or logo
            if plain_available > 0:
                plain_available -= 1
            elif logo_available > 0:
                logo_available -= 1
            else:
                # Need to buy a logo T-shirt
                logo_available -= 1
        elif S[day] == '2':
            # Must wear logo
            if logo_available > 0:
                logo_available -= 1
            else:
                # Need to buy a logo T-shirt
                logo_available -= 1

    print(-logo_available)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
